arts.ttl: Preview: Newcastle United vs. Arsenal - prediction, team news, lineups
arts.sum: Sports Mole previews Wednesday's EFL Cup clash between Newcastle United and Arsenal, including predictions, team news and possible lineups.

arts.ttl: Jones praises Gunners' 'calmness' in winter transfer window
arts.sum: Phil Jones and Michael Brown discuss Arsenal's "calm" approach to the winter transfer window saying the Gunners "don't panic buy".

arts.ttl: Arsenal transfer latest: January window stance 'revealed' as deadline day approaches end
arts.sum: Arsenal are yet to make a signing in the January transfer window and question marks remain about whether their squad is strong enough to win the Premier League.

arts.ttl: Lloyd Kelly departs Newcastle in Juventus loan move: Key details revealed including obligation to buy fee
arts.sum: Newcastle United defender Lloyd Kelly joins Italian giants Juventus on a loan deal with an obligation to make the move permanent.

Newcastle are 90 minutes away from Wembley and hold a two-goal advantage over Arsenal heading into Wednesday's game. The Magpies have endured a wobble of late, losing their last two home games. Since...

arts.ttl: Juventus confirm loan signing of Newcastle star Lloyd Kelly with £20m buy option for the defender
arts.sum: Lloyd Kelly has joined Juventus on loan for the rest of the season with the option for the Serie A side to sign him for £20million. He only joined the Magpies on a free transfer from Bournemouth in June

arts.ttl: Chelsea 2-1 West Ham: Blues come from behind to claim three points as Pedro Neto strikes before Cole palmer forces Aaron Wan-Bissaka own goal
arts.sum: IAN LADYMAN AT STAMFORD BRIDGE: Graham Potter probably feels he didn't have a lot of luck during his short time as manager at Stamford Bridge. Some things in football just don't change.

arts.ttl: Kortrijk loan former Arsenal youngster to Scottish side St Mirren
arts.sum: Kortrijk have announced that Ryan Alebiousu is joining St Mirren on loan until the end of the season. The 23-year-old wide man leaves relegation threatened Kortrijk having played 13 games…

arts.ttl: Neto finds crucial equaliser for Chelsea after lengthy VAR check
arts.sum: Neto finds crucial equaliser for Chelsea!

arts.ttl: Gabriel Martinelli defends Myles Lewis-Skelly Man City celebration as Arsenal title claim made
arts.sum: Martinelli said: “We are going to go there to win the game and to score three, four, five. Gabriel Martinelli has come to the defence of Myles Lewis-Skelly's much-talked-about celebration during Arsenal's emphatic 5-1 victory over Manchester City, asserting that the young Gunner meant no disrespect to Erling Haaland.
